title: craftable spawn eggs and spawners
description: craft spawn eggs and spawners have fun
body:
Have you ever wanted to craft spawn eggs and spawners, well now you can with this mod. You will just need some Amethyst Shards, eggs, and random mob items.(Note: somethings are really hard to get, just letting you know)

wolf spawn egg (4 amethyst shards, 1 raw beef, 1 raw pock chop, 1 rotten flesh, 1 egg)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ced636b540dab0bfc3df4db4ccfb4d89ed707b6.png)

</details>
vilager spawn egg (4 amethyst shards, 4 emeralds, 1 egg)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![vilager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb7bdbf866dd87798e71718e225a3044c0b5617f.png)

</details>
spawner (4 amethyst shards, 4 iron bars)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/210c575394e06ebb89b847ff1e6d4f356a407898.png)

</details>
wither ( 4 amethyst shards, 3 wither skeleton skulls, 1 soul sand, 1 egg)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![wither](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e4ff17a08c007015c2a6a50669024db74810645.png)

</details>
